summary:
Adam recapped a demo call with Dialpad, a prospective client looking to clean up their marketplace and eventually build a full-on marketplace similar to Shopify/Zoom. Phase 1 would involve a custom submission/review workflow with Contentful integration and authentication. Adam suggested being aggressive by starting work before the March kickoff to get ahead of competing SaaS vendors. The scope includes login, submission creation/editing, review workflow, and Contentful publishing integration.

Brad raised questions about the Last Rev roadmap and pipeline over the next few months, including Diligent analytics work, IAS search feature, localization for Diligent (likely assigned to Jamie), and the potential construction deal (SBI Builders). They discussed getting the Last Rev website live - it's on Vercel with Sanity CMS, needs content trimmed to a few pages with customer stories, a homepage video inspired by Palantir's approach, and an AI assessment funnel to reduce enterprise sales friction.

They also troubleshot Brad's Alpha Agent Mac app installation issues on Adam's machine (DMG showing as corrupt), discussed WideOpenWest (WOW) positive feedback from JD about data quality improvements, and noted WOW's merger/acquisition that could increase their budgets.
keyDiscussionPoints: Dialpad prospect demo - marketplace Phase 1 scope with custom CMS workflow
Last Rev pipeline: Diligent analytics, IAS search, localization, construction deal
Last Rev website needs to go live - Vercel/Sanity, homepage video, AI assessment funnel
Alpha Agent Mac app installation issues on Adam's machine
WOW positive feedback on data quality and potential budget increase from merger
decisions: Be aggressive with Dialpad - propose starting before March kickoff with a POC
Keep Last Rev website simple - trim to single page with customer stories initially
May need a third-party analytics specialist for Diligent analytics project
Localization work for Diligent will go to Jamie

actionItems.action: Get Dialpad meeting transcript from Krista and prepare proposal
Trim Last Rev website pages and prepare content for launch
Create Sanity account under DevAt or migrate existing one
Fix Alpha Agent Mac app build/install issues
Put Sanity credentials in LastPass for shared access

followUp: IAS search feature - sell or gift?
Alpha Agent Mac app fix for Adam's machine
jiraNote: JIRA credentials not configured - unable to search for related tickets
